attendees: Commissioners, Theresa Keeler, Betsy Lynn, and James McFadden
Residents of Attick Towers, Elizabeth Norman
residents_comments: The ROSS Coordinator ensures residents of Attick Towers to go online at https://www.doineedacovid19test.com/
Residents were assisted in the ordering of free online COVID tests
42 residents received food from the Capital Food Bank
700 masks delivered by Severna Park Elks
fresh meals delivered by CKAR CDC
pantry items provided by Al-Huda school
Residents assisted with holiday celebrations, tree decorating ceremony and a celebration party
executive_directors_report: covid testing of the waste water ended in December with no positive tests reported
decisions: Unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0 to approve the agenda, as amended
Unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0 the financial reports of December 31, 2021
Unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0 to approve the regular monthly meeting minutes from December 16, 2021 and the executive session minutes as submitted
Unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0 for payment of all the approved invoices
Unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0 to adjourn the regular monthly meeting
